heading: Omitted
label: 616aa to 616hh Omitted
notes: CodificationSection 616aa, , , , authorized construction, operation, and maintenance of Dixie project, Utah, and described the principal features of this project.Pub. L. 88–565, § 178 Stat. 848Sept. 2, 1964Section 616aa–1, , , , reauthorized this project for construction and provided for integration and participation of this project in Lower Colorado River Basin Development Fund.Pub. L. 90–537, title III, § 30782 Stat. 893Sept. 30, 1968Section 616bb, , , , related to protection of downstream water users against impairment of water quality from operations of this project and to indemnification.Pub. L. 88–565, § 278 Stat. 848Sept. 2, 1964Section 616cc, , , , related to laws governing this project.Pub. L. 88–565, § 378 Stat. 848Sept. 2, 1964Section 616dd, , , , related to establishment of a conservancy district or similar organization prior to construction of this project.Pub. L. 88–565, § 478 Stat. 848Sept. 2, 1964Section 616ee, , , , related to interest rate, repayment of construction costs and period for repayment.Pub. L. 88–565, § 578 Stat. 848Sept. 2, 1964Section 616ff, , , , related to construction, operation, and maintenance of recreational facilities in connection with this project.Pub. L. 88–565, § 678 Stat. 849Sept. 2, 1964Section 616gg, , , , provided that use of water diverted for this project from Colorado river system be subject to Colorado River compact, Boulder Canyon Project Act ( et seq.), and Mexican Water Treaty (Treaty Series 994).Pub. L. 88–565, § 778 Stat. 84943 U.S.C. 617Sept. 2, 1964Section 616hh, , , ; , , , authorized appropriations for this project.Pub. L. 88–565, § 878 Stat. 849Pub.
